# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind launches AI-assisted sign-in and updated challenges
- Summary: CodeGrind enhances onboarding with Google Authentication and AI-assisted guidance for DS&A challenges, plus dynamic problem filtering for tailored practice.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assisted-sign-in-and-challenges
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assisted-sign-in-and-challenges
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-11-codegrind-ai-assisted-sign-in-and-challenges.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: A streamlined sign-in flow with Google authentication paired with Azure OpenAI-powered guidance improves user onboarding and problem-solving aids, while new difficulty-based filtering personalizes the learning path.
- CTA: Try the Google sign-in today and explore AI-assisted problem solving in your next challenge.
- Visual brief: Static announcement-style graphic showing Google sign-in button, AI assistant chat icon, and a sample CodeGrind problem panel with difficulty filters, in CodeGrind’s cyberpunk-inspired UI colors.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
